name: @ggui-samples/ggui-leaflet-demo
description: Reference sample: ggui server pre-configured with the @ggui-samples/gadget-leaflet plugin registered on `app.gadgets`. Demonstrates the end-to-end plugin slice — agent contracts may declare `clientCapabilities.gadgets[*].component = 'LeafletMap'`, and the boilerplate generator + CSP derivation handle bundle loading + tile origin allowlisting. Pair with @ggui-samples/agent-claude-sdk to exercise via real LLM. Not published.
